title: SENIOR LAW PROJECT - 211info
text: LEGAL AID SERVICES OF OREGON PORTLAND REGIONAL OFFICE SENIOR LAW PROJECT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides legal advice, referral, and representation to older adults on a range of legal issues, such as assisted living facility problems, guardianship and conservatorship defense, debt collection, and financial abuse. Eligibility: Age 60 and older. Must reside in Multnomah County or have a legal issue in Multnomah County. Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-11:50am and 1pm-3:50pm (503) 224-4086 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 224-4086 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Case-specific papers should be brought to the initial application and screening LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Multnomah County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 9am-noon and 1pm-5pm Services: Elder Law Other Services Offered At This Location: LEGAL SERVICES - GENERAL LEGAL AID LEGAL SERVICES - OREGON RENTER'S RIGHTS RESOURCES LEGAL SERVICES - PUBLIC BENEFITS HOTLINE TAX ORGANIZATIONS AND SERVICES - LOW INCOME TAXPAYER CLINIC If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. No Mapping Information Available
